choice: Base + named overrides (deltas) on shared domain model
rationale: Human-chosen during grooming (overrode recommendation: Make a Scenario = the shared household domain model + a named set of forecast-assumption OVERRIDES (deltas). The scenario references the same People/Accounts/Holdings and their actual balances; it carries only the knobs that change a projection: per-person end-ages (ae3a6a6a) and income-stream start/end dates (f05bc34e, e.g. 'retire 2 years earlier'), the real spending schedule (fb2dfbc8), target allocation, withdrawal order (fe56f1d6), fee drag (d84bc8b5), SSA claiming ages, inflation override (fe17d0a2), and the set of One-Time Events (8b19f9b0). Everything not overridden inherits the household baseline.)
